response:
[IDENTIFY CORE TASK]  
THE CORE TASK IS TO CALCULATE THE DIFFERENCE IN TIME PER QUESTION BETWEEN CHEMISTRY AND BIOLOGY TESTS.  

[DEFINE ROLE]  
SOPHIA HAS TO ALLOCATE EQUAL TIME PER QUESTION FOR BOTH TESTS.  

[SET CONSTRAINTS]  
SHE HAS 45 MINUTES FOR BIOLOGY AND 60 MINUTES FOR CHEMISTRY.  

[REQUIRE OUTPUT]  
THE RESPONSE MUST SHOW THE DIFFERENCE IN TIME PER QUESTION BETWEEN CHEMISTRY AND BIOLOGY.  

[FINAL ANSWER]  
[COMPUTE TIME PER QUESTION]  
BIOLOGY: 45 MINUTES = 2700 SECONDS / 25 QUESTIONS = 108 SECONDS PER QUESTION.  
CHEMISTRY: 60 MINUTES = 3600 SECONDS / 20 QUESTIONS = 180 SECONDS PER QUESTION.  

[DIFFERENCE]  
CHEMISTRY HAS 180 - 108 = 72 MORE SECONDS PER QUESTION THAN BIOLOGY.  

[END WITH SAME WORD]  
[END]
